content:
# elizaos/cloud Daily Update (Apr 27, 2026)

## OVERVIEW 
Development on April 27 focused on advancing the monetization framework for Eliza Cloud. Key achievements include the implementation of pay-as-you-go container hosting using app earnings, a comprehensive rebuild of the app-auth consent flow, and the addition of managed Google calendar support for Milady LifeOps.

## KEY TECHNICAL DEVELOPMENTS

*   **Monetization and Billing Infrastructure**
    *   Implemented pay-as-you-go container hosting, allowing hosting bills to be paid directly from an organization's `redeemable_earnings` before utilizing `credit_balance` ([#477](https://github.com/elizaos/cloud/pull/477)).
    *   Reworked `appCreditsService` to support monetized applications and integrated a new pay-as-you-go toggle ([#474](https://github.com/elizaos/cloud/pull/474), [#477](https://github.com/elizaos/cloud/pull/477), [#478](https://github.com/elizaos/cloud/pull/478)).
    *   Updated database schemas to support earnings-based funding and credit conversion ledger types ([#478](https://github.com/elizaos/cloud/pull/478)).

*   **Milady LifeOps Enhancements**
    *   Added `GET /api/v1/milady/google/calendar/calendars` to enable listing managed Google calendars, addressing a connectivity gap for secondary calendars ([#472](https://github.com/elizaos/cloud/pull/472)).

*   **System Maintenance**
    *   Performed synchronization of `dev` to `main` branches to ensure codebase consistency ([#475](https://github.com/elizaos/cloud/pull/475), [#476](https://github.com/elizaos/cloud/pull/476)).

## NEWLY OPENED PULL REQUESTS
*   [#479](https://github.com/elizaos/cloud/pull/479): ci: add migration diagnostics to backend deploy.

## CLOSED ISSUES
*   None.

## NEW ISSUES
*   None.

## ACTIVE ISSUES
*   **[#79](https://github.com/elizaos/cloud/issues/79) Dependency Dashboard**
    *   Recent activity indicates a stack of PRs is being prepared to address dependency updates, including major version bumps for Node.js (v24), TypeScript (v6), and others.
    *   Development is currently gated by a required fix for a transitive dependency issue in `@elizaos/plugin-todo` and `@elizaos/plugin-rolodex`.
    *   Contributors noted that CI workflows on the `develop` branch require updates to properly invoke `bun install` and `tsc` to catch typecheck failures and dependency breakages.
